name: Rich Chocolate Caramels
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugars, corn syrup, half-and-half, and chocolate in a large heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to boil, stirring to melt chocolate and dissolve sugar.
3. Reduce heat to moderate and continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until syrup reaches 248°F (firm-ball stage) on a candy thermometer.
4. Remove from heat. Quickly stir in butter and vanilla just until blended and butter melts.
5. Pour into well-greased 8x8x2 inches pan.
6. Cool; cut into small squares.
7. If desired, top each square with pecan half or almond slivers.
8. Wrap individually in plastic wrap or foil.
9. Store in a cool, dry place. Makes about 1-1/2 pounds.
